summary: Phase 1 – TestimonialCard.astro: Added optional `image?: string` prop to the Props interface. Conditionally renders an `` when an image URL is provided, falling back to the initials `.author-avatar` div. Added `.author-photo` CSS rule (48×48 px, border-radius 50%, object-fit cover).

Phase 2 – Testimonials.astro: Replaced 3 dummy testimonials (Marco Rossi, Sarah Kim, James Walsh) with 2 real ones — Marcelo Simionato (AR) and Catalina Caicedo (CL) — each wired to their Firebase Storage photo URLs. Updated grid from `repeat(3, 1fr)` to `repeat(2, 1fr)` with `max-width: 900px`. Removed the redundant 1024 px breakpoint; kept only the 640 px mobile breakpoint.
Phase 3 – i18n es.ts: Replaced testimonials 1–3 with real Spanish-language text from Marcelo Simionato and Catalina Caicedo (only 2 keys remain).
Phase 3 – i18n en.ts: English translation of both testimonials; removed third testimonial key.
Phase 3 – i18n zh.ts: Simplified Chinese translation of both testimonials; removed third testimonial key.

Phase 4 – Integration: No additional wiring required. The existing `<Testimonials>` component calls in index.astro, en/index.astro, and zh/index.astro automatically pick up all changes via the i18n `t()` function.
